message:
fix: switch mcp_agent_mail from Python to Rust installer

- Update KNOWN_INSTALLERS URL from mcp_agent_mail (Python) to
  mcp_agent_mail_rust
- Update checksums.yaml with new URL and SHA256
- Replace Python-specific installer flags (--dir) with Rust flags (--migrate)
- Simplify amserve() helper to use Rust am defaults instead of Python
  SQLAlchemy DATABASE_URL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -496,18 +496,12 @@ fi
 
 # MCP Agent Mail helper (leave the real `am` CLI available for service/macros)
 amserve() {
-  local storage_root="$HOME/.mcp_agent_mail_git_mailbox_repo"
-
   if ! command -v am &>/dev/null; then
-    echo "am CLI not found"
+    echo "am CLI not found — install with: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail_rust/main/install.sh | bash"
     return 1
   fi
 
-  mkdir -p "$storage_root"
-  STORAGE_ROOT="$storage_root" \
-  DATABASE_URL="sqlite+aiosqlite:///${storage_root}/storage.sqlite3" \
-  HTTP_PATH=/mcp/ \
-  am serve-http --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765 --path /mcp --no-auth --no-tui
+  am serve-http --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765 --no-tui
 }
 
 # --- ACFS tool aliases (new tools) ---

@@ -79,8 +79,8 @@ installers:
     sha256: "7d6129655eb40e9ca86c94dcc40d86c6582b80e42e1de9b4ae879b6f85101f7b"
 
   mcp_agent_mail:
-    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail/main/scripts/install.sh"
-    sha256: "4bab82d54419acc36a3d62b4319775df2f1ff5138c3e53048892521d58806f6a"
+    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail_rust/main/install.sh"
+    sha256: "4cb53c7d2f29f2ed890d7f2a87601b8c71d9dec145abac46ed7a2cde7d58d75d"
 
   mdwb:
     url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/markdown_web_browser/main/install.sh"

@@ -1968,7 +1968,7 @@ update_stack() {
                 chmod +x "$tmp_install"
                 log_item "run" "MCP Agent Mail"
 
-                if bash "$tmp_install" --dir "$HOME/mcp_agent_mail" --yes --no-start; then
+                if bash "$tmp_install" --yes --migrate; then
                     local uid
                     local runtime_dir
                     local user_bus
